item.title: MIUI OS3.0.310.0.WAACNXM Fastboot update for Redmi K90 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K90 Max China

Codename: prague

Version: OS3.0.310.0.WAACNXM | 16.0

Size: 13.7 GB

MD5: 86eda8f5bb4bea07ea7461c8c9b5dd3f

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability and user experience
Fix: Occasional audio issues in some scenarios
[Other improvements and optimizations]
Optimization: Battery usage and refresh rate for some games

Download: Here
